Mass.name: Mass
Mass.description: 1D mechanical mass. Accelerates according to Newton's second law.

Spring.name: Spring
Spring.description: 1D mechanical spring. Exerts force proportional to displacement.

Damper.name: Damper
Damper.description: 1D mechanical damper. Exerts force proportional to relative velocity.

Ground.name: Ground
Ground.description: Fixed ground reference. Position is fixed at zero.

Force.name: Force
Force.description: External force actuator. Applies a constant external force.

PositionSensor.name: PositionSensor
PositionSensor.description: Exposes the absolute position of the connected port junction.

VelocitySensor.name: VelocitySensor
VelocitySensor.description: Exposes the absolute velocity of the connected port junction.

Resistor.name: Resistor
Resistor.description: Ideal electrical resistor. Dissipates electrical energy according to Ohm's law.

Capacitor.name: Capacitor
Capacitor.description: Ideal electrical capacitor. Stores electrical energy in an electric field.

Inductor.name: Inductor
Inductor.description: Ideal electrical inductor. Stores electrical energy in a magnetic field.

ElectricalGround.name: ElectricalGround
ElectricalGround.description: Electrical ground reference. Voltage is fixed at zero.

VoltageSensor.name: VoltageSensor
VoltageSensor.description: Electrical voltage sensor. Exposes the voltage potential of the connected junction.

CurrentSensor.name: CurrentSensor
CurrentSensor.description: Electrical current sensor. Placed in series to measure branch current.

ModularBody.name: ModularBody
ModularBody.description: 3D Rigid Body with quaternion orientation states and ports at CoM (p0) and end offset (p1).

ModularPinJoint.name: ModularPinJoint
ModularPinJoint.description: 3D pin (revolute) joint allowing Z rotation between parent and child frames.

OrientationSensor.name: OrientationSensor
OrientationSensor.description: Measures orientation matrix elements and converts to Euler angles.
